markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore a YouTube collaboration between GrowthX and No Code MBA.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Primary Goal:** GrowthX needs a high volume of leads (5k–10k/mo) to hit its target of 50–100 new paying community members/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=2123.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** A long-term partnership using evergreen YouTube content (mid-rolls, back catalog links) to create a consistent lead stream, replacing GrowthX's current one-off event model.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [**Compensation:** GrowthX is open to flexible models (CPL, rev-share) to make the partnership financially compelling for Seth, who must weigh the opportunity cost of promoting a third-party offer over his own.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Marketing Challenge

  - [**Business Model:** GrowthX is a growth agency ($10M+ ARR) specializing in AI SEO and content systems for tech clients (e.g., Webflow, Stripe).](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**Community as a Funnel:** The agency uses a paid community (\~400 members @ $30/mo) as its primary marketing engine to build an audience.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [**Lead Generation Gap:** Current marketing relies on one-off events (e.g., workshops) that create traffic spikes but lack the consistent, evergreen lead flow that YouTube can provide.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

### Proposed Collaboration Models

  - [**Newsletter Sponsorship:** A direct ad in the No Code MBA newsletter (21k subscribers).](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [**Mid-Roll Sponsorships:** Evergreen ads in new videos.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Guarantees a permanent slot in the description and pinned comment, providing a long-term lead source as videos gain views over time.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
  - [**Back Catalog Links:** Adding GrowthX links to relevant older videos.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Taps into the channel's largest source of views for a scalable, low-effort lead stream.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [**Co-Created Content:** Joint workshops or a YouTube series.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Builds authority and generates high-quality leads through a more organic, educational format.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

### Compensation & Financial Alignment

  - [**The Challenge:** Seth must weigh the financial benefit of promoting GrowthX against the opportunity cost of promoting his own No Code MBA membership.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Flexibility:** Jason is open to various models to ensure the partnership is financially compelling for Seth.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [**CPL (Cost Per Lead):** A flat fee for each email signup.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
      - [**Rev-Share:** A percentage of revenue from members sourced through the partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
      - [**Full Affiliate:** All revenue from sourced members is passed to Seth.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Seth:**](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=2709.0)
      - [Provide pricing for a newsletter sponsorship.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
      - [Evaluate the financial viability of adding GrowthX links to the back catalog.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=2709.0)
      - [Share any successful back catalog partnership models discovered.](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=2709.0)
      - [Continue brainstorming larger-scale collaborations (e.g., co-created content).](https://fathom.video/share/VnNJY3DVZtEzCxt1XR18sixmhhRqCFv6?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)
